name: Cloudflare
description: Effortlessly configure Cloudflare's trusted IPs and manage Origin CA certificates.

USE_CLOUDFLARE.help: Activate Cloudflare automations (real IP, trusted-IP allowlisting, Origin CA certificates, mTLS, ...).
USE_CLOUDFLARE.label: Use Cloudflare automations

CLOUDFLARE_API_TOKEN.help: Cloudflare API token to authenticate with the Cloudflare API.
CLOUDFLARE_API_TOKEN.label: Cloudflare API token

CLOUDFLARE_ZONE_ID.help: Cloudflare Zone ID (if no zone ID is provided, the plugin will try to get it from the API).
CLOUDFLARE_ZONE_ID.label: Cloudflare Zone ID

CLOUDFLARE_MANAGE_ORIGIN_CERTS.help: Activate automatic management of Origin CA certificates.
CLOUDFLARE_MANAGE_ORIGIN_CERTS.label: Automatic management of Origin CA certificates

CLOUDFLARE_ORIGIN_CERT_TYPE.help: Signature type desired on origin CA certificates ("rsa", or "ecdsa").
CLOUDFLARE_ORIGIN_CERT_TYPE.label: Origin CA certificates type

CLOUDFLARE_ORIGIN_CERT_VALIDITY.help: Validity period of origin CA certificates in days.
CLOUDFLARE_ORIGIN_CERT_VALIDITY.label: Origin CA certificates validity

CLOUDFLARE_ADDITIONAL_TRUSTED_FROM.help: Additional IPs/networks to consider as trusted, separated with spaces (CIDR notation).
CLOUDFLARE_ADDITIONAL_TRUSTED_FROM.label: Additional trusted IPs

CLOUDFLARE_DENY_NON_TRUSTED_IPS.help: Deny access to non-trusted IPs (the ones not in Cloudflare's official list and the additional trusted IPs).
CLOUDFLARE_DENY_NON_TRUSTED_IPS.label: Deny non-trusted IPs

CLOUDFLARE_API_URL.help: Base URL of the Cloudflare API (advanced; for a Cloudflare-compatible/proxied endpoint or testing).
CLOUDFLARE_API_URL.label: Cloudflare API URL

CLOUDFLARE_API_TIMEOUT.help: Timeout in seconds for Cloudflare API requests.
CLOUDFLARE_API_TIMEOUT.label: Cloudflare API timeout (s)

CLOUDFLARE_IPS_V4_URL.help: URL to download Cloudflare's IPv4 ranges from (advanced/testing).
CLOUDFLARE_IPS_V4_URL.label: Cloudflare IPv4 list URL

CLOUDFLARE_IPS_V6_URL.help: URL to download Cloudflare's IPv6 ranges from (advanced/testing).
CLOUDFLARE_IPS_V6_URL.label: Cloudflare IPv6 list URL

CLOUDFLARE_AUTO_REAL_IP.help: Automatically configure NGINX real_ip_header/real_ip_recursive for Cloudflare. Disable if the core Real IP plugin (USE_REAL_IP) already manages them to avoid duplicate directives.
CLOUDFLARE_AUTO_REAL_IP.label: Auto-configure real IP

CLOUDFLARE_REAL_IP_HEADER.help: Header carrying the real client IP. CF-Connecting-IP (default), True-Client-IP (Enterprise alias) or CF-Connecting-IPv6 (when Pseudo-IPv4 is enabled).
CLOUDFLARE_REAL_IP_HEADER.label: Real IP header

CLOUDFLARE_STRIP_SPOOFED_HEADERS.help: Strip client-supplied CF-* headers (CF-Connecting-IP, CF-IPCountry, CF-RAY, True-Client-IP, ...) when the connection is not from a trusted Cloudflare IP, to prevent spoofing.
CLOUDFLARE_STRIP_SPOOFED_HEADERS.label: Strip spoofed Cloudflare headers

CLOUDFLARE_AUTHENTICATED_ORIGIN_PULLS.help: Require Cloudflare Authenticated Origin Pulls (mTLS): verify the connection presents Cloudflare's origin-pull client certificate. Mutually exclusive with the core mTLS plugin on the same server.
CLOUDFLARE_AUTHENTICATED_ORIGIN_PULLS.label: Authenticated Origin Pulls (mTLS)

CLOUDFLARE_AOP_MODE.help: Authenticated Origin Pulls enforcement: 'log' only warns on connections without a valid Cloudflare client certificate, 'enforce' denies them.
CLOUDFLARE_AOP_MODE.label: Authenticated Origin Pulls mode

CLOUDFLARE_AOP_CA_URL.help: URL of the Cloudflare Authenticated Origin Pull CA certificate (advanced/testing).
CLOUDFLARE_AOP_CA_URL.label: Authenticated Origin Pull CA URL

USE_CLOUDFLARE_EDGE_BAN_SYNC.help: Push BunkerWeb's active bans to a Cloudflare account IP List. Reference that list from a Cloudflare WAF custom rule to block the offenders at the edge (the plugin syncs the list, it does not create the rule). Requires USE_REDIS=yes and an account-scoped API token (Account Filter Lists:Edit).
USE_CLOUDFLARE_EDGE_BAN_SYNC.label: Sync bans to Cloudflare edge

CLOUDFLARE_ACCOUNT_ID.help: Cloudflare Account ID owning the edge ban IP List.
CLOUDFLARE_ACCOUNT_ID.label: Cloudflare Account ID

CLOUDFLARE_BAN_LIST_NAME.help: Name of the Cloudflare account IP List used for edge ban sync (lowercase letters, digits and underscores).
CLOUDFLARE_BAN_LIST_NAME.label: Edge ban IP List name

CLOUDFLARE_EDGE_BAN_API_TOKEN.help: Account-scoped API token (Account Filter Lists:Edit) for edge ban sync. Falls back to CLOUDFLARE_API_TOKEN if empty.
CLOUDFLARE_EDGE_BAN_API_TOKEN.label: Edge ban API token
